text: Our paper "MIO: Towards Interactive Intelligence for Digital Humans" is now available on arXiv.
We have released the MIO codebase and pretrained models on GitHub and Hugging Face.
Project Sekai achieves 24fps real-time world generation at 720p with bidirectional attention distillation.
MioVerse.ai platform launched — unifying Digital Human Agents and Interactive World Models under one research umbrella.
Shanda AI Research Tokyo officially launches, bringing together researchers in vision, graphics, and multimodal AI.
